name: current-2026-high-score-tail
description: Exact 2026 test of championship-scoped event score-scale corrections against the current residual-ridge default.

notes: The championship scale candidates only use known event metadata plus official scores from earlier matches in the same event.
This is a targeted attempt to reduce high-score championship tail error without changing ordinary regional/district predictions.
